forensic_demarcation_rules.server_infrastructure_impact: ZERO_IMPACT (Request does not hit upstream servers)
forensic_demarcation_rules.vulnerability_classification: Client Profile Noise Generation / Script Race Condition

remediation_verification_checklist: Load browser target page within a clean Firefox profile via 'firefox -P' shell switch
Execute target hydration test under Private Browsing context with extension access flags revoked
Correlate profile-specific randomized GUID string against the internal debugging runtime table
